mapper.select: select id, entrustment_no, entrust_type, entrust_people, entrust_phone, witness_uint, witness_person, witness_phone, project_name, project_part, sampling_method, check_purpose, report_count, report_type, request_date, payment_method, present_information, acceptance_date, team, state, remark, invalid_reason, operate_user, operate_date, file_url, is_save from test_entrusted_info where id = #{id}

SELECT t1.id as id, t1.entrustment_no as entrustmentNo, t3.sample_name as sampleName, t1.entrust_people as entrustPeople, t1.project_name as projectName FROM test_entrusted_info AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t3 ON t2.sample_id = t3.id
and t1.entrustment_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustmentNo},'%')
and t3.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleNname},'%')
and t1.entrust_people LIKE CONCAT('%',#{entrustPeople},'%')
and t1.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{projectName},'%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT into test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel(sample_id, check_item_id, standard_id, method_id, times, unit_price ) VALUES
(#{item.sampleId},#{item.checkItemId},#{item.standardId},#{item.methodId},#{item.times},#{item.unitPrice})
insert into test_entrusted_payment_record(entrustment_id, price, payment_date, operator ) values (#{entrustmentId},#{price},#{paymentDate},#{operator})
mapper.select: SELECT t2.id VALUE, t2.CODE label FROM ( SELECT * FROM test_product_standard_file_rel WHERE product_id = #{productId} ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_file_id = t2.id where t2.type in (1,3)
mapper.insert: insert into test_entrusted_info(id, entrustment_no, entrust_type, entrust_company, entrust_people, entrust_phone, witness_uint, witness_person, witness_phone, project_name, project_part, sampling_method, check_purpose, report_count, report_type, request_date, payment_method, present_information, business_acceptor, acceptance_date, team, state, remark, invalid_reason, operate_user, operate_date, file_url, seal_type, is_save, count_price ) values (#{id}, #{entrustmentNo}, #{entrustType}, #{entrustCompany}, #{entrustPeople}, #{entrustPhone}, #{witnessUint}, #{witnessPerson}, #{witnessPhone}, #{projectName}, #{projectPart}, #{samplingMethod}, #{checkPurpose}, #{reportCount}, #{reportType}, #{requestDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{presentInformation}, #{businessAcceptor}, #{acceptanceDate}, #{team}, #{state}, #{remark}, #{invalidReason}, #{operateUser}, #{operateDate}, #{fileUrl}, #{sealType}, #{isSave}, #{countPrice} )
